title: Gimme Shelter

earnings.assumptions: The headline range is treated as artist-side participation, with gross track, label, publishing, and writer lanes modeled from the song's classic-rock streaming and sync profile.

ownership.master_owner: ABKCO-controlled Rolling Stones 1960s master in current digital catalog availability.
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer-side value is modeled separately because Jagger/Richards songwriting participation is central to the composition.
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled.
ownership.notes: The track is treated as a legacy catalog asset where sync reuse can materially widen annual outcomes.

meaning_summary: Its dramatic energy and constant reuse in film and media help explain why it remains one of the strongest earning Stones recordings.
revenue_drivers: Sync placements materially extend the song's commercial life.
Catalog streaming and best-of listening keep demand steady.
